variants: As the Facilitator of Trillium Music Mentors, Abeba Ndeh dedicates her time to enriching the musical talents of aspiring musicians in her community. The Flintwood Scholars Group is the primary funding source for her research projects, enabling her to explore innovative ideas. Abeba is also proficient in Hebrew vocabulary, enhancing her communication with a diverse audience.
